prompt: check if the api is healthy after the deploy, just want a quick sanity check

assertions.text: Report is concise (under 100 lines or clearly abbreviated)
At least 4 resource GETs hit: templates, themes, artifacts, providers
One deck CRUD cycle: create, fetch, and delete
At least one search call made (web or image)
No error-path probes or security tests (smoke scope only)
Structured environment summary included (providers, search config, DB status)
